description: WAI-ARIA Feed timeline of user actions. Author renders <article data-activity data-time=ISO> children; component decorates with relative-time badges, optional date grouping, optional infinite-scroll sentinel, and per-entry avatar / icon left-rail.

attributes.name: data-group
attributes.description: none (default) | day | week — date headings between entries

attributes.name: data-infinite
attributes.description: Adds an IntersectionObserver sentinel; emits activity-feed:load-more when reached

attributes.name: data-empty-text
attributes.description: Text shown when the feed has zero entries (default "No recent activity")

attributes.name: role
attributes.description: Set to "feed" per WAI-ARIA Feed pattern

events.name: activity-feed:load-more
events.description: Fires when the infinite-scroll sentinel enters the viewport

properties.name: addEntry
properties.description: Append (or prepend) an entry from data

properties.name: entries
properties.description: Live list of decorated entry elements

childAttributes.name: data-activity
childAttributes.description: Marks an article as a feed entry

childAttributes.name: data-time
childAttributes.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; renders as relative time

childAttributes.name: data-activity-avatar
childAttributes.description: Avatar URL — renders <user-avatar> in the left rail

childAttributes.name: data-activity-icon
childAttributes.description: icon-wc name — renders <icon-wc> in the left rail (alternative to avatar)
